Where to stay in Vienna ✨🇦🇹 @hotelmottovienna 

A place where retro charm meets modern elegance, and time slows down in the best way. With a stunning restaurant offering fantastic breakfast options and a cosy terrace, this place is truly a gem in Vienna ✨💛

📍 Boutique Hotel MOTTO, Mariahilfer Straße 71a
